subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I call upon Thee at this moment when sorrows have encompassed me from every side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انادیک حینئذ حین الذی احاطتنی الاحزان عن کل الجهات
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment
